lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in good condition. The exterior and interior show minor signs of wear from regular use. All mechanical components are functioning properly and the vehicle has been well-maintained.
Fair condition.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor signs of use. The interior is clean with minimal wear. All mechanical and electrical components are in good working order.

Get ready to hit the road in this fantastic find! This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-cared for, offering a reliable and smooth driving experience. You'll find a clean, comfortable interior and a dependable engine. While there are a few minor signs of normal wear, it’s a solid choice for anyone looking for a quality ride at a great value!

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been reliably maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior presents well, though you will find a few minor stone chips on the hood and some light surface swirls in the paint consistent with regular washing. Inside, the cabin is clean and well-preserved; the upholstery shows some light creasing but remains free of tears or stains. All electronic features and climate controls are fully functional. Mechanically, the car is solid and drives smoothly, backed by a consistent service history. It is a dependable, attractive option for a buyer seeking a well-cared-for vehicle that is ready for daily use.

This vehicle is in fair condition and offers a reliable option for those seeking a functional daily driver at an accessible price point. The engine starts without trouble, though potential buyers should be aware of a minor oil seep near the valve cover and a slight rough idle when the car is cold. The transmission remains operational across all gears, though shifts can occasionally feel less than seamless. On the exterior, the paint shows its age with some fading on the hood and several small dings and scratches consistent with its mileage. Inside, the cabin is clean but shows visible wear on the driver’s seat bolster and some fading

This unit has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and road-readiness. Featuring a well-preserved aesthetic and a documented history of consistent care, it represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a reliable, high-caliber pre-owned automobile.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my reliable ride, and it’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, so it’s ready to hit the road with a new owner right away. If you're looking for a dependable car that still looks great and runs smoothly, this is the one for you! I've priced it to move quickly because I'd love to see it go to a good home soon. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Up for sale is a remarkably well-maintained vehicle that strikes the perfect balance between luxury and performance. Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it the perfect companion for your next road trip or daily commute. Everything runs smoothly and it still looks great on the road! I'm looking for a smooth sale, so I've priced it to move. Come take it for a spin—I think you’re going to love it!

Offered is a driver-focused E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54B32 inline-six power plant with high-pressure VANOS and individual throttle bodies. This example delivers linear power delivery up to its 8,000 RPM redline through a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. Recent preventative maintenance includes subframe reinforcement and rod bearing replacement, ensuring structural integrity under high lateral G-loads. The chassis remains taut with a limited-slip variable M differential providing exceptional traction. While showing honest patina consistent with its mileage, the mechanical synchronization and throttle response remain razor-sharp. A visceral, analog driving experience for the discerning enthusiast.
Used car. Good condition. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Regular maintenance performed. Minor cosmetic wear.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes an ideal balance between luxury and everyday utility. The exterior retains a deep, glossy luster, though a discerning eye might find a few minor stone chips on the lower front fascia—honest signs of its enjoyed miles on the road. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary; the premium upholstery is supple with only light natural creasing on the driver’s side bolster, and every electronic feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system, operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, having followed a strict preventative maintenance schedule. Recent service includes a fresh synthetic oil change and a comprehensive multi-point inspection, confirming that the engine pulls strong and the transmission shifts smoothly through every gear. The tires have significant tread remaining, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. Garage-kept and smoke-free, this car represents a reliable, high-quality example of the marque that is ready for its next long-distance journey or daily commute.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure consistent performance and reliability. Featuring a clean interior and a well-preserved exterior, it offers a refined driving experience for the discerning owner. Secure this professionally vetted example today.

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning motorist. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable mechanical and aesthetic condition, it offers a harmonious balance of proven performance and long-term reliability. The interior remains well-preserved, and the drivetrain has been rigorously vetted to ensure it meets our dealership’s exacting standards for roadworthiness. This is a premier selection for those who prioritize a dependable, high-caliber driving experience without compromise.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-maintained—perfect for anyone looking for a reliable daily driver that still looks great on the road. I've taken great care of it, and it's totally ready for its next adventure with you! Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

This E92 M3 is a mechanically sound driver’s specimen featuring the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8 and a tactile 6-speed manual gearbox. Engineered for high-revving precision, the power plant utilizes eight individual throttle bodies and an ionic current knock control system to reach its 8,400 RPM redline. This example has undergone critical preventative maintenance, including rod bearing replacement and updated throttle actuators, ensuring the VANOS system remains within peak operating parameters. The chassis is equipped with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and an M Variable Differential Lock, providing superior kinematic feedback and lateral stability. While the aesthetics reflect honest road use, the structural integrity and drivetrain remain robust, offering a pure analog performance experience for the serious enthusiast.
Used vehicle in good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Minimal exterior wear. Runs reliably.

This 2019 Audi A6 Premium Plus is a meticulously maintained luxury sedan that perfectly balances executive style with spirited performance. Finished in a deep Moonlight Blue Metallic, the exterior remains highly attractive with a lustrous finish, showing only the minor, expected road wear of a well-loved vehicle. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of Nougat Brown leather and natural wood inlays; the seats are supple and free of any significant wear or blemishes. Every technological feature, including the high-resolution Virtual Cockpit and the premium Bang & Olufsen 3D sound system, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is in excellent health, having followed a strict professional maintenance schedule. The turbocharged engine provides smooth, responsive power, while the Quattro all-wheel-drive system ensures confident handling in all weather conditions. Recent service includes a fresh oil change and a comprehensive multi-point inspection, confirming that the brakes and tires have significant life remaining. This is a smoke-free, garage-kept vehicle that offers a sophisticated driving experience for its next owner.

Experience the visceral engagement of this Porsche 997.1 Carrera. Powered by a robust 3.6L flat-six engine, this machine delivers linear power delivery through a precise 6-speed manual transaxle. The chassis features Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM) for variable damping, perfectly complementing the rear-engine weight bias for unparalleled corner-exit traction. This example is mechanically sorted, featuring an updated IMS bearing and a cooling system optimized for thermal efficiency. A true driver’s spec, it offers a pure analog connection to the tarmac with a chassis that remains taut and responsive. Performance-ready and aesthetically well-preserved, it is the ideal entry point for the 911 purist.
Reliable used car. Good condition. Clean interior. Mechanically sound. Recent maintenance completed.

This meticulously maintained 2019 Audi A6 Premium Plus offers a sophisticated driving experience with a focus on reliability and comfort. The exterior displays a deep, lustrous finish, showing only minor cosmetic imperfections expected from light use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean; the leather seating is well-preserved, and all electronic systems, including the dual-screen MMI touch response and premium audio, operate perfectly. Mechanically, this vehicle is in solid shape, having undergone regular professional servicing with a complete record available. It delivers a smooth, quiet ride and has been kept in a smoke-free environment. A well-cared-for example that is ready for its next owner.
